label: Airframes Stream
info:
Receives JSON events from socket_client.py via HTTP POST /airframes.
Dashboard: https://orange.prefix64.org:1880/airframes-dashboard

ACAS decoder: @airframes/acars-decoder (npm) runs natively in Node-RED function nodes.
libacars:      decode_acars_apps binary (kept for ARINC-622 / CPDLC labels).

Install before deploying:
  cd ~/.node-red && npm install @airframes/acars-decoder
Then in Node-RED Settings → functionExternalModules: true

name: Normalize, cache and route
